reason: Replace the custom-rate Djibouti route with one reviewed engine: current 10% VAT corroborated by later official finance laws, whole-FDJ rounding, exact-evidence 0% and exemption paths, and FDJ 80m/120m thresholds presented only as review screens. The original law page retains superseded 7% wording, so the public page discloses the source conflict and asks users to confirm the consolidated CGI before filing.
